hero.sub: A global advertising & creative studio operating at the intersection of design, technology, and culture. We engineer digital flagships for visionary brands.

statement.body: Every pixel has a purpose. Every frame carries intention. Pixelectro is a precision instrument, calibrated to shift how the world sees your brand — from Alexandria to New York, we translate ideas into visual architectures that outlast trends and define categories.

process.step1Body: We immerse in your brand, market, and audience to architect a strategy.
process.step2Body: We craft bold creative concepts that challenge convention.
process.step3Body: Our studios execute with military precision across every discipline.
process.step4Body: We launch, measure, and optimize until results exceed expectations.

servicePages.brandingDesc: We craft distinctive brand identities that captivate audiences and define market categories.
servicePages.webDesc: Custom digital platforms engineered for performance, aesthetics, and scale.
servicePages.videoDesc: Cinematic storytelling that transforms brand narratives into unforgettable visual experiences.
servicePages.graphicDesc: Visual systems that communicate with precision and resonate with intention.
servicePages.threeDDesc: Three-dimensional worlds and motion graphics that push creative boundaries.
servicePages.socialDesc: Strategic social presence that builds communities and drives engagement.
servicePages.uiDesc: User experiences designed for clarity, delight, and conversion.
servicePages.marketingDesc: Data-driven campaigns that maximize reach and deliver measurable results.

about.intro: Pixelectro is an innovative company founded in 2023, specializing in providing comprehensive advertising, branding, and digital marketing solutions. Our primary goal is to empower businesses to grow by leveraging the power of design and cutting-edge technology.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.desc: To be the preferred creative partner for ambitious businesses across the region, and to contribute to the positive transformation of the digital landscape — one brand at a time.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.desc: To help business owners develop and scale their ventures through the strategic fusion of world-class design, cinematic storytelling, and performance-driven digital marketing.

items.title: Diverse Expertise
items.desc: Our team comprises elite specialists across branding, film, 3D, software engineering, and marketing — delivering fully integrated solutions under one roof.

items.title: Proven Results
items.desc: We have successfully developed over 40 businesses and social media presences, achieving remarkable results in boosting sales and brand recognition for our clients.

items.title: Client-First Approach
items.desc: We work closely with each client to deeply understand their needs and deliver bespoke solutions that precisely meet their objectives.

testimonialsPage.title: What Our Clients Say
testimonialsPage.subtitle: Real experiences from the brands and creators we've worked with across the globe.
testimonialsPage.emptyState: No testimonials yet. Be the first to share your experience!
testimonialsPage.formDesc: Your testimonial will appear on this page after moderation (usually within 24h).
testimonialsPage.successDesc: Your review has been submitted and is awaiting moderation. It will appear once approved.
testimonialsPage.rateLimitedDesc: You have already submitted a testimonial recently. Thank you for your support!
